name: sidebar-01
description: A simple sidebar with navigation links grouped by section. Use as the starting point for a dashboard's app-shell navigation.

files.content:
import { Home, Inbox, Search, Settings } from "lucide-react" import { Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupContent, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarHeader, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuItem, } from "@/components/ui/sidebar" const items = [ { title: "Home", url: "#", icon: Home }, { title: "Inbox", url: "#", icon: Inbox }, { title: "Search", url: "#", icon: Search }, { title: "Settings", url: "#", icon: Settings }, ] export function AppSidebar() { return (
Acme Inc
 Application {items.map((item) => ( {item.title} ))} ) }
